mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, user_no, avatar_url, gender, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, user_no, avatar_url, gender, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, user_no, avatar_url, gender ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{userNo}, #{avatarUrl}, #{gender} )
